about.title: About Me
about.description: Web developer focused on the Vue and Nuxt ecosystem. I specialize in building scalable, accessible, and performant web applications with a focus on great user experience.

blog.title: Latest Articles
blog.description: Insights on Vue, Nuxt, and Frontend Engineering.

items.quote: Daniel is an exceptional developer who truly understands the Nuxt ecosystem. His ability to build performant and maintainable architectures is outstanding.
Working with Daniel was a breeze. He delivered a high-quality, accessible application that exceeded our performance goals. Highly recommended for any Vue-based project.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about working with me on web development and frontend projects.

questions.label: What technologies do you specialize in?
questions.content: I specialize in Vue 3, Nuxt 3, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. I have deep experience in building complex frontend architectures and optimizing for performance.

questions.label: Do you work with backend or full-stack?
questions.content: While my core focus is Frontend with Vue/Nuxt, I'm proficient in building full-stack applications using Nitro, PostgreSQL, and Drizzle ORM.

questions.label: How do you handle performance optimization?
questions.content: I follow best practices like SSR, hydration optimization, image compression, and efficient state management. I use tools like Lighthouse and PageSpeed Insights to ensure top-tier performance.

questions.label: What is your development workflow?
questions.content: I use a modern stack including Bun for runtime, GitHub for version control, and automated CI/CD pipelines for deployment, usually on Cloudflare or Vercel.

hero.title: Daniel Marchi
hero.description: Senior Frontend Engineer specializing in Vue and Nuxt. I build robust web architectures and premium digital experiences.

bullets: Led the migration of a large-scale application to Nuxt 3, improving performance by 40%.
Implemented a custom UI component library using Tailwind CSS and Headless UI.
Developed multiple high-traffic e-commerce sites using Vue and Nuxt.
Optimized Core Web Vitals for various client projects, achieving scores above 90.
Built responsive and interactive landing pages for international brands.
Collaborated with designers to implement pixel-perfect user interfaces.
Maintained and improved legacy JavaScript applications.
Gained experience in version control and team collaboration.
